nodes.summary: Factory function supporting multiple .populate() calls.

nodes.summary: Factory function to mock MongoDB aggregation pipelines with all pipeline stages.

nodes.summary: Factory function to mock Model.countDocuments().

nodes.summary: Factory function creating a complete HTTP response mock for Express handlers.

nodes.label: createMockNotificationService()
nodes.summary: Factory function creating a notification service mock with all common notification methods.

nodes.label: createMockPublishSyncEvent()
nodes.summary: Factory function creating a sync event publisher mock.

nodes.label: createMockLogger()
nodes.summary: Factory function creating a logger mock with debug, info, warn, error levels.

nodes.summary: Historical database design providing both MySQL and MongoDB schema definitions.

nodes.summary: Current authoritative data model synchronized with Mongoose models, listing all 12 models with fields, indexes, and relationships.

nodes.label: User Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB User model with openid, nickname, avatar, role, status, and learning statistics fields.

nodes.label: Admin Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB Admin model with username, email, password, role, permissions, and status fields.

nodes.label: Period Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB Period model representing a learning camp cycle with title, dates, price, status, and enrollment stats.

nodes.label: Section Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB Section model representing a daily learning task within a Period, with periodId+day unique constraint.

nodes.label: Enrollment Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB Enrollment model recording user registration for a Period, with userId+periodId unique constraint.

nodes.label: Payment Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB Payment model linking Enrollment, User, and Period with amount, method, status, and transactionId.

nodes.label: Checkin Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB Checkin model for daily user check-ins with userId+sectionId unique constraint, likes, and public flag.

nodes.label: Comment Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB Comment model for checkin comments with nested replies array, likes, and likeCount.

nodes.label: Insight Model (小凡看见)
nodes.summary: MongoDB Insight model for AI-generated feedback on user checkins, supporting daily/weekly/monthly/insight types.

nodes.label: InsightRequest Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB InsightRequest model tracking requests to view another user's insights with approval workflow.

nodes.label: Notification Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB Notification model for real-time and persistent notifications with read/archive status.

nodes.label: UserActivity Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB UserActivity model for tracking user actions with action type, target, and period context.

nodes.label: Auth API Endpoints
nodes.summary: Authentication endpoints for WeChat login, token refresh, admin login, and password management.

nodes.label: Users API Endpoints
nodes.summary: User management endpoints for profile, phone binding, stats, and admin user management.

nodes.label: Periods & Sections API Endpoints
nodes.summary: Period and section CRUD endpoints with public/user/admin access levels.

nodes.label: Nginx Reverse Proxy
nodes.summary: Nginx serves as reverse proxy and load balancer for both mini-program and admin backend traffic.

nodes.label: Node.js + Express Backend
nodes.summary: Application server layer built with Node.js and Express, containing auth, user, period, checkin, comment, and AI modules.

nodes.label: MongoDB Database
nodes.summary: Primary database using MongoDB for flexible document storage of all application data.

nodes.label: Redis Cache
nodes.summary: Redis used for caching to improve performance.

nodes.label: Tencent Cloud COS
nodes.summary: Tencent Cloud Object Storage for file uploads (images, videos, audio).

nodes.label: WeChat API
nodes.summary: WeChat API integration for login (code2Session), payment, and subscribe messages.

nodes.label: Hi-Fi Demo v3.0
nodes.summary: High-fidelity frontend demo HTML file for the mini-program UI.

nodes.label: Admin Guide HTML
nodes.summary: Admin guide HTML document for the 凡人共读 reading admin backend.

nodes.label: WeChat Login Flow
nodes.summary: WeChat login process: mini-program calls wx.login(), sends code to backend, backend calls code2Session, creates/updates user, returns JWT.

nodes.label: Checkin Flow
nodes.summary: Daily checkin process where enrolled users submit checkins per section with userId+sectionId uniqueness constraint.

nodes.label: Enrollment & Payment Flow
nodes.summary: Enrollment generates an Enrollment record; Payment links to Enrollment/User/Period; both statuses gate learning access.

nodes.label: Insight Request Flow
nodes.summary: Users can request to view another user's insights; InsightRequest tracks apply/approve/reject/withdraw lifecycle.

nodes.label: Mocha + Chai + Sinon
nodes.summary: Testing stack: Mocha as test runner, Chai for assertions, Sinon for stubs and spies.

nodes.label: 完整测试体系
nodes.summary: 三层测试体系：219手工验收测试+1597自动化单元测试，总计1816个测试用例

nodes.label: 生产服务器
nodes.summary: 线上服务器118.25.145.179，域名wx.shubai01.com，使用PM2管理Node.js进程

nodes.label: Docker Compose部署
nodes.summary: Docker Compose编排MongoDB、MySQL、Redis和后端服务的容器化部署

nodes.label: Redis
nodes.summary: Redis缓存服务，作为后端工具层的依赖组件使用。

nodes.label: Admin 管理后台
nodes.summary: Vue 3 + Vite 管理后台，供运营人员管理期次、用户、报名、支付、内容审核、数据统计等，支持超级管理员跨租户操作。

nodes.label: Admin Components
nodes.summary: 可复用 UI 组件，包含表格、表单、弹窗、图表等通用组件，供各视图页面复用。

nodes.label: Admin Stores (Pinia)
nodes.summary: Pinia 状态管理，管理用户认证状态、当前租户、全局 UI 状态等。

nodes.label: Admin Router
nodes.summary: Vue Router 路由配置，定义管理后台所有页面路由，包含路由守卫（登录态检查）和权限控制。

nodes.label: Admin Views
nodes.summary: 管理后台页面层，包含 Dashboard、用户管理、期次管理、报名管理、支付管理、内容管理、审计日志、数据统计、租户管理等 20 个视图。

nodes.label: Admin API Layer
nodes.summary: 基于 axios 的 API 请求封装层，统一处理认证 token 注入、X-Active-Tenant 请求头、错误处理和响应格式化。

nodes.label: Operations Scripts
nodes.summary: 项目运维辅助脚本，包含启动本地服务、运行测试、搜索历史 bug、检查部署、备份数据库、发布到生产等功能，不包含数据库初始化/重置脚本。

nodes.label: Backend 后端
nodes.summary: Node.js + Express 后端，提供 REST API 和 WebSocket，通过 AsyncLocalStorage 实现请求级租户上下文，Mongoose plugin 自动注入 tenantId 过滤。

nodes.label: Backend Middleware
nodes.summary: 中间件层，包含 JWT 认证、管理员认证、租户上下文注入、响应缓存、限流、统一错误处理、请求监控、操作审计等。

nodes.label: Backend Utils
nodes.summary: 工具层，提供 JWT 签发/验证、Redis 客户端、WebSocket 管理器、日志、缓存 key 生成、租户上下文（AsyncLocalStorage）、配置校验、告警、监控规则等横切关注点工具。

nodes.label: Backend Models (Mongoose)
nodes.summary: Mongoose 数据模型层，定义 User、Tenant、Period、Section、Checkin、Enrollment、Payment、Insight、Comment、Notification、AuditLog 等 15+ 个集合 Schema，所有模型通过 tenantPlugin 自动注入 tenantId。

nodes.label: Backend Models
nodes.summary: Mongoose data models layer within the backend, child of the backend component.

nodes.label: Backend Controllers
nodes.summary: HTTP request/response handler layer with 23 controllers covering user, auth, period, section, checkin, insight, payment, enrollment, notification, ranking, admin, audit, backup, wechat, and tenant domains.

nodes.label: Backend Routes
nodes.summary: Express routing layer defining all API endpoints (auth, user, period, section, checkin, insight, payment, enrollment, notification, ranking, admin, audit, backup, wechat, etc.) with auth and tenant middleware.

nodes.label: Backend Services
nodes.summary: Business logic layer encapsulating payment, backup, sync, subscribe messages, study reminders, period status, community access, WeChat API calls, and cron jobs.

nodes.label: External Services
nodes.summary: External service boundary for WeChat platform APIs, WeChat Pay, Socket.IO clients, browser clients, and email/notification dependencies reached from backend/src/services/ and miniprogram wx APIs.

nodes.label: WeChat Pay
nodes.summary: WeChat Pay unified-order and callback boundary used by payment.service.js and payment.controller.js to create prepay parameters and accept payment callbacks.

nodes.label: Subscribe Messages
nodes.summary: WeChat subscribe-message delivery API used by subscribe-message.service.js and reminder schedules, tracking grants and delivery attempts in MongoDB.

nodes.label: WeChat Login
nodes.summary: WeChat login endpoint used by wechat.service.js to exchange wx.login codes for openid, session_key, and unionid; mocked in dev/test environments.

nodes.label: Socket Clients
nodes.summary: Realtime client boundary for Socket.IO/WebSocket updates; backend maps user IDs to socket connections in websocket.js, miniprogram manages client-side connect/reconnect/dispatch.

nodes.label: WeChat JSSDK
nodes.summary: WeChat access-token and JSAPI-ticket endpoints used by wechat-jssdk.service.js to create signatures for webview or H5 WeChat features.

nodes.label: MySQL
nodes.summary: Auxiliary database for data sync and backup, receiving async data from MongoDB via Redis queue to support analytics and cross-system integration.

nodes.label: Admin Console
nodes.summary: Vue 3 admin console under admin/src/ providing authenticated operational screens for dashboard, enrollments, payments, periods, users, content, check-ins, insights, analytics, audit logs, and more.

nodes.label: Admin Stores
nodes.summary: Pinia stores under admin/src/stores/ keeping admin auth state, user/period state, UI state, and counters.

nodes.label: Admin Components
nodes.summary: Shared Vue components under admin/src/components/ including admin layout shell, rich text editor, and icon components.

nodes.label: Admin API Client
nodes.summary: Admin HTTP layer in admin/src/services/api.ts using Axios with Bearer token auth, response envelope unwrapping, and domain API groupings.

nodes.label: Admin Utils & Types
nodes.summary: Utility and TypeScript type modules under admin/src/utils/ and admin/src/types/ providing logging, avatar helpers, export helpers, and API type definitions.

nodes.label: Admin App Shell
nodes.summary: Admin application shell in admin/src/main.ts and App.vue bootstrapping Vue, global styles, router, Pinia, and Element Plus UI.

nodes.label: Admin Views
nodes.summary: View components under admin/src/views/ implementing operational pages for dashboard, enrollments, payments, periods, users, content, check-ins, insights, analytics, audit logs, and more.

nodes.label: Admin Router
nodes.summary: Vue Router configuration in admin/src/router/ defining login and protected admin routes with token restoration and auth redirect.

nodes.label: Storage Layer
nodes.summary: Persistence and runtime storage used by the backend, comprising MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, and file uploads.

nodes.label: MongoDB
nodes.summary: Primary document store in the storage layer, child of storage-layer.

nodes.label: MySQL
nodes.summary: Secondary relational store reached via mysql2; receives transformed MongoDB documents through sync services and participates in backup, comparison, and recovery workflows.

nodes.label: Miniprogram Client
nodes.summary: Native WeChat miniprogram under miniprogram/ containing app startup, pages, components, service wrappers, request/token handling, environment config, and local utilities.

nodes.label: App Entry
nodes.summary: Bootstrap files app.js and app.json defining page registration, tab bar, startup navigation, login-state restoration, system info capture, and lifecycle tracking.

nodes.label: Miniprogram Client Components
nodes.summary: Reusable miniprogram components under miniprogram/components/ including course cards and notification badges, providing shared UI without a separate frontend framework.

nodes.label: Config & Utils
nodes.summary: Configuration and utilities under miniprogram/config/ and miniprogram/utils/ covering environment API endpoints, constants, storage helpers, formatting, markdown, avatar, and subscription helpers.

nodes.label: Pages
nodes.summary: Page implementations covering public browsing, login, enrollment, payment, reading, check-in, ranking, member profiles, notifications, insights, sharing, legal pages, and profile editing.

nodes.label: Request Client
nodes.summary: Shared HTTP/upload wrapper in miniprogram/utils/request.js handling auth tokens, response normalization, token refresh with request queue, and get/post/put/delete/patch/upload helpers.

nodes.label: Services
nodes.summary: Domain service wrappers under miniprogram/services/ grouping backend API calls for auth, periods, enrollment, payment, check-in, comments, ranking, notifications, insights, and WebSocket updates.

nodes.label: MP Config
nodes.summary: Configuration layer containing environment config (dev/prod API addresses) and constant definitions (storage keys, business constants).

nodes.label: Miniprogram Components
nodes.summary: Reusable UI components based on WeUI including navigation bar, check-in cards, insight cards, bullet comments, and loading states.

nodes.label: Miniprogram MP Services
nodes.summary: Service layer in the miniprogram that encapsulates all backend API calls, handling token injection and X-Wx-AppId tenant identification.

nodes.label: Miniprogram Pages
nodes.summary: Page layer of the miniprogram containing 25 pages including home, course list/detail, check-in, insights, ranking, payment, enrollment, and profile.

nodes.label: Miniprogram MP Utils
nodes.summary: Utility functions for the miniprogram including logging, multi-tenant local storage (tenantStorage), formatting, and image processing.

nodes.label: WeChat Open Platform
nodes.summary: External WeChat Open Platform providing OAuth login (code2session), subscription message push, and JS-SDK capabilities per tenant AppId.

nodes.label: Backend API
nodes.summary: Express backend under backend/src/ that loads environment config, starts HTTP and Socket.IO, connects databases, mounts middleware and API routes, and runs production schedules.

nodes.label: Backend Middleware
nodes.summary: Middleware layer covering authentication, role checks, audit logging, cache behavior, error handling, monitoring metrics, and rate limiting.

nodes.label: Backend Config
nodes.summary: Backend configuration defining database connections for MongoDB and MySQL, CORS policy, subscription-message templates, and sync configuration.

nodes.label: Backend Utilities
nodes.summary: Utility modules providing JWT helpers, logging, Redis access with memory fallback, Socket.IO user maps, response helpers, config validation, and alerting.

nodes.label: Backend Server Runtime
nodes.summary: Backend process entry in backend/src/server.js that loads env files, validates config, connects Redis/MongoDB/MySQL, starts Express and Socket.IO, and runs scheduled jobs.

nodes.label: Controllers
nodes.summary: Controller layer nested within the backend-api, handling request/response logic.

nodes.label: Routes
nodes.summary: Route modules under backend/src/routes/ defining all API endpoints including auth, users, periods, check-ins, payments, and more.

nodes.label: Express App
nodes.summary: Express composition root in backend/src/app.js configuring middleware, routes, WebSocket, monitoring, and error handling.

nodes.label: Services
nodes.summary: Service modules under backend/src/services/ isolating WeChat calls, payments, sync, backups, notifications, and scheduling.

nodes.label: MySQL Pool
nodes.summary: MySQL connection pool configured from MYSQL_* env vars, used by sync, backup, comparison, and recovery code.

nodes.label: Backup Service
nodes.summary: Backup service in backend/src/services/backup.service.js that exports MongoDB and MySQL snapshots and runs scheduled production jobs.

nodes.label: Upload Files
nodes.summary: Uploaded files stored under backend/uploads/ and served statically by Express for admin content and avatar uploads.

nodes.label: Storage Context
nodes.summary: Describes storage perspective focusing on operational topology rather than product data lifecycle.

nodes.label: Storage Constraints
nodes.summary: Backup commands allowed; initialization, clearing, or resetting database data requires explicit user confirmation.

nodes.label: Storage Concerns
nodes.summary: Redis fallback prevents cache failures from breaking requests, but MongoDB disconnects in production are fatal by design.

nodes.label: Storage Todo
nodes.summary: Reminder to add details when new storage systems, backup locations, sync tables, or Redis queue names are introduced.

nodes.label: Mongoose Models
nodes.summary: Mongoose model layer under backend/src/models/ defining document schemas, indexes, ObjectId relations, and model helper methods for business entities.

nodes.label: Sync Service
nodes.summary: MongoDB-to-MySQL sync service in backend/src/services/sync.service.js that publishes events to Redis, consumes queued tasks, transforms documents, and performs upserts with retry.

nodes.label: Redis Manager
nodes.summary: Redis runtime manager in backend/src/utils/redis.js wrapping connection, key operations, expiry, sorted-set ops, counters, status reporting, and fallback memory cache.

nodes.label: Route-Page Map
nodes.summary: Navigation map for WeChat miniprogram page groups and Vue admin console routes, showing how user journeys and admin screens connect to backend route families.

nodes.label: Auth Entry Pages
nodes.summary: Authentication and monetization entry pages (login, enrollment, payment) coordinating WeChat login, token storage, enrollment submission, order creation, and payment confirmation.

nodes.label: Notification & Profile Pages
nodes.summary: Notification and profile pages managing user identity, avatars, preferences, notification read/archive state, and subscription permissions.

nodes.label: Learning Workflow Pages
nodes.summary: Member learning workflow pages (checkin, checkin-records, ranking, members, share) relying on enrollment access, task data, check-in, comment, and ranking APIs.

nodes.label: miniprogram/app.json
nodes.summary: Authoritative complete miniprogram page list; route-page-map groups are derived from it.

nodes.label: WeChat Miniprogram
nodes.summary: WeChat miniprogram with tabBar entries for home, reading camps, and profile; handles auth redirects and unauthenticated user flows.

nodes.label: Miniprogram Tab Pages
nodes.summary: Main tabBar entries in miniprogram/app.json: index, periods, and profile pages with startup routing logic.

nodes.label: Insight Workflow Pages
nodes.summary: Pages for displaying and managing 小凡看见 content, insight requests, approvals, danmaku, likes, and user profile context.

nodes.label: Public Browse Pages
nodes.summary: Public and semi-public learning browse pages including periods, courses, reading-mode, and legal pages accessible before or around authentication.

nodes.label: Admin Management Views
nodes.summary: Admin views for dashboard metrics, enrollments, payments, periods, users, and content management via admin API and backend routes.

nodes.label: Admin Operational Views
nodes.summary: Admin screens for check-ins, insights, analytics, audit logs, database comparison, subscription debugging, and account management requiring careful auth.

nodes.label: External Integrations
nodes.summary: All integration points with the WeChat platform: OAuth login, subscribe messages, JS-SDK, and WeChat Pay.

nodes.label: Socket.IO Runtime
nodes.summary: Realtime runtime in backend/src/server.js and backend/src/utils/websocket.js that tracks user-to-socket mappings for targeted and broadcast notifications.

nodes.label: WeChat Subscribe Message API
nodes.summary: WeChat subscribe-message send endpoint used by subscribe-message.service.js to deliver scene-specific templated reminders with grant tracking.

nodes.label: WeChat Login API
nodes.summary: api.weixin.qq.com/sns/jscode2session endpoint used to exchange miniprogram login codes for openid.

nodes.label: WeChat Token and Ticket API
nodes.summary: api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/ endpoints for obtaining access_token and jsapi_ticket.

nodes.label: WeChat Pay API
nodes.summary: api.mch.weixin.qq.com/pay/unifiedorder endpoint for creating prepay orders and receiving payment callbacks.

nodes.label: wx Client APIs
nodes.summary: Miniprogram-side wx APIs (wx.login, wx.requestPayment, wx.requestSubscribeMessage) that obtain login codes and permissions.

nodes.label: Email Runtime
nodes.summary: Nodemailer-based email delivery runtime available for mail delivery features in the backend.

nodes.label: admin/src/services/api.ts
nodes.summary: Admin frontend API service layer that admin management views call to reach backend /api/v1 routes.

nodes.label: miniprogram/app.json
nodes.summary: Miniprogram app configuration file that defines the tabBar entries and page routes.

nodes.label: miniprogram/app.js
nodes.summary: Miniprogram startup script that chooses routing based on environment, login state, and external launch path.

nodes.label: subscribe-message.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that builds scene-specific template data, respects grant counts, records delivery attempts, and supports reminder scheduling.

nodes.label: backend/src/utils/websocket.js
nodes.summary: Utility module managing user-to-socket mappings and exposing push methods for controllers and services.

nodes.label: backend/src/server.js
nodes.summary: Backend server entry point where the Socket.IO realtime runtime is created and initialized.

nodes.label: Tenant Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB model storing per-tenant WeChat configuration (appId, appSecret, mchId) for multi-tenant WeChat API calls.

nodes.label: wechat.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that dynamically reads tenant WeChat config when calling WeChat APIs.

nodes.label: payment.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that dynamically reads tenant payment config when calling WeChat Pay APIs.

nodes.label: wx-login (WeChat OAuth)
nodes.summary: WeChat OAuth login interface (code2session): miniprogram calls wx.login() to get a temporary code, backend exchanges it for openid and session_key, then issues a JWT token.

nodes.label: wx-subscribe (Subscription Message)
nodes.summary: WeChat subscription message push interface; study-reminder.service.js calls it daily at 05:45/06:00 to push study reminders to subscribed users.

nodes.label: wx-payment (WeChat Payment)
nodes.summary: WeChat payment flow: payment.service.js creates orders and returns pre-pay parameters, miniprogram calls wx.requestPayment(), WeChat callbacks backend to verify signature and update order status.

nodes.label: WeChat JS-SDK
nodes.summary: WeChat JS-SDK for web authorization and sharing; backend wechat-jssdk.service.js generates signature tickets, frontend uses it to configure share cards and other WeChat native capabilities.

nodes.label: Miniprogram WeChat Client APIs
nodes.summary: WeChat client APIs invoked from the miniprogram runtime including wx.login, wx.request, wx.uploadFile, wx.requestPayment, wx.requestSubscribeMessage, wx.connectSocket, storage, navigation, and system APIs.

nodes.label: wechat-jssdk.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that retrieves WeChat access_token and JSAPI ticket, then signs URLs for WeChat web capabilities.

nodes.label: study-reminder.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that sends daily study reminder notifications via WeChat subscription messages at 05:45 and 06:00.

nodes.label: AsyncLocalStorage (ALS)
nodes.summary: Node.js AsyncLocalStorage used to propagate tenantId context through the request lifecycle without manual parameter passing.

nodes.label: Mongoose Tenant Plugin
nodes.summary: Mongoose plugin that automatically reads tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage and injects it as a filter condition on all queries.

nodes.label: JWT Token
nodes.summary: JWT issued after WeChat login, carrying tenantId so subsequent requests can identify the tenant context.

nodes.label: Nodemailer
nodes.summary: Node.js email library used as the backend email dependency for notification or operational delivery.

nodes.label: Data Flow Diagram
nodes.summary: Top-level architecture diagram grouping models by product capability to show data flow across MongoDB, MySQL, and Redis stores.

nodes.label: Primary Store (MongoDB)
nodes.summary: MongoDB is the authoritative store for all live application data.

nodes.label: Derived Store (MySQL)
nodes.summary: MySQL derived store used for synchronized copies, comparisons, backups, and recovery workflows with data transformed from MongoDB.

nodes.label: Runtime Store (Redis)
nodes.summary: Redis runtime data includes cache entries, monitoring samples, rate-limit counters, alert throttles, and MongoDB-to-MySQL sync queue tasks.

nodes.label: Backup Service
nodes.summary: Scheduled backup service that runs daily: MongoDB at 02:00, MySQL at 02:30, and cleans expired backup files at 03:00.

nodes.label: Identity Data
nodes.summary: User and admin tokens and profiles used to authenticate protected flows.

nodes.label: Learning Content
nodes.summary: Period and Section documents plus reading task metadata exposed to public browsing, enrolled users, and admin content-management screens.

nodes.label: Enrollment and Payment
nodes.summary: Enrollment and Payment models covering access checks, payment initiation, confirmation, cancellation, WeChat callback handling, and membership status updates.

nodes.label: Participation Data
nodes.summary: Checkins, comments, and rankings that feed visibility, stats, and ranking features.

nodes.label: Insight Data
nodes.summary: Manual or generated insight documents, insight request workflows, approvals/rejections/revocation, likes, admin edits, and danmaku records.

nodes.label: Notification Data
nodes.summary: Notifications, subscribe grants, and deliveries that notify users and record delivery state.

nodes.label: Audit and Ops Data
nodes.summary: Admin write audit logs, user activity records, monitoring metrics, alert throttle keys, backup metadata, database comparison output, and deployment helper artifacts.

nodes.label: Insight Data
nodes.summary: Data category for '小凡看见' feedback content in the system.

nodes.label: Identity Data
nodes.summary: WeChat openid/session-derived users, JWT tokens, admin accounts, and local token state.

nodes.label: Notification Data
nodes.summary: In-app notifications, subscribe-message grants, delivery records, and WebSocket push state.

nodes.label: Participation Data
nodes.summary: Check-ins, comments, replies, likes, reading completions, and user activity records.

nodes.label: Primary Store (MongoDB)
nodes.summary: MongoDB primary application store accessed through Mongoose models; production disconnects are fatal.

nodes.label: Miniprogram Assets
nodes.summary: Static assets directory for the WeChat miniprogram including images and icons.

nodes.label: TabBar Icons
nodes.summary: SVG/PNG TabBar icons for home and user tabs; must be converted to PNG for WeChat miniprogram use.

nodes.label: OpenSpec Project Context
nodes.summary: Project conventions, tech stack, domain context, and constraints for the 凡人共读 morning reading camp system.

nodes.label: OpenSpec AGENTS Guide
nodes.summary: Three-stage spec-driven development workflow: create proposals, implement changes, archive completed changes.

nodes.label: Change: Add Immersive Reading Share
nodes.summary: Proposal to add full-screen immersive reading mode and '分享此刻' poster generation for course reading module.

nodes.label: Tasks: Add Immersive Reading Share
nodes.summary: Implementation checklist for immersive reading share: page route, entry point, content loading, poster generation.

nodes.label: Spec: Immersive Reading Mode (Share)
nodes.summary: Requirements for immersive reading mode and '分享此刻' poster with period, lesson, excerpt, and miniprogram code.

nodes.label: Change: Add Reading Completion Celebration
nodes.summary: Proposal to add non-blocking completion celebration after user finishes immersive reading, with server state tracking.

nodes.label: Tasks: Add Reading Completion Celebration
nodes.summary: Implementation checklist for reading completion celebration including session state, inline prompt, fireworks, and server sync.

nodes.label: Design: Reading Completion Celebration
nodes.summary: Technical design for reading completion: local session detection, server state via userId+sectionId, inline prompt, fireworks.

nodes.label: Spec: Immersive Reading Completion (Celebration)
nodes.summary: Requirements for valid reading completion detection, non-blocking encouragement prompt, fireworks effect, and server state.

nodes.label: Change: Add Sent Insight Request Status
nodes.summary: Change to add '我发起的' tab to insight request page showing sent request statuses with segmented switching.

nodes.label: Design: Sent Insight Request Status
nodes.summary: Design for showing sent InsightRequest statuses with segmented tabs, read-only view, and status label colors.

nodes.label: Immersive Reading Capability
nodes.summary: Full-screen focused reading mode for course '读一读' module with poster sharing and completion tracking.

nodes.label: UserReadingCompletion Model
nodes.summary: Server-side model storing userId+sectionId reading completion with timestamp and duration, unique per user-section pair.

nodes.label: Reading Completion API
nodes.summary: Protected endpoint to report and retrieve reading completion status per userId+sectionId.

nodes.label: GET /insights/requests/sent
nodes.summary: Existing backend endpoint returning insight requests sent by the current user.

nodes.label: Reading Mode Page
nodes.summary: WeChat miniprogram page providing immersive full-screen reading with paragraph tracking and sharing.

nodes.label: Insight Requests Page
nodes.summary: Miniprogram page showing received and sent insight requests with segmented tab switching.

nodes.label: Home Today Task Entry
nodes.summary: Home page today's task section showing '去晨读'/'已晨读' entry based on reading completion state.

nodes.label: Period Course List Page
nodes.summary: Period course list showing per-day completion markers for reading and check-in status.

nodes.label: insightService
nodes.summary: Frontend service providing getReceivedRequests() and getSentRequests() for insight request data.

nodes.label: reading-completion.js Utility
nodes.summary: Miniprogram utility for local reading completion state management and server sync fallback.

nodes.label: OpenSpec Three-Stage Workflow
nodes.summary: Spec-driven development process: Stage 1 create proposal, Stage 2 implement, Stage 3 archive after deployment.

nodes.label: Period (学习期次)
nodes.summary: A learning cycle/cohort in the morning reading camp system.

nodes.label: Section (课节)
nodes.summary: A single day's lesson within a Period.

nodes.label: Checkin (打卡)
nodes.summary: User check-in record for a Section, distinct from reading completion.

nodes.label: Insight (小凡看见)
nodes.summary: Personalized feedback content for users in the morning reading camp.

nodes.label: 变更：增加我发起的请求看见状态展示
nodes.summary: 在小程序请求看见体验中增加我发起的视图，展示发起申请的状态（等待中/已同意/已拒绝）

nodes.label: Spec: insight-requests（发起状态视图）
nodes.summary: 定义我发起的请求状态视图、请求方向切换和移动端请求卡片的需求规格

nodes.label: 变更：同意小凡看见申请后发送订阅通知
nodes.summary: 在接收方同意小凡看见申请后，通过微信订阅消息体系通知发起方并支持直达内容页

nodes.label: 设计：订阅通知直达小凡看见详情
nodes.summary: 描述订阅通知的数据配置、授权时机、跳转策略和发送时机的技术设计

nodes.summary: 订阅通知变更的实施任务清单，涵盖规格确认、基础设施、同意链路和测试验证

nodes.label: Spec: insight-requests（审批订阅通知）
nodes.summary: 定义同意申请后订阅通知发起方、申请通过提醒授权和通知直达目标一致性的需求规格

nodes.label: 我发起的请求视图
nodes.summary: 小程序中展示用户自己发起的小凡看见申请及其状态的视图

nodes.label: 请求方向切换
nodes.summary: 在收到请求和发起请求之间切换的分段控件

nodes.label: GET /api/v1/insights/requests/sent
nodes.summary: 获取当前用户发起的小凡看见申请列表的后端接口

nodes.label: 订阅消息 scene: insight_request_approved
nodes.summary: 小凡看见申请被同意后向发起方发送的微信订阅消息场景标识

nodes.label: approveInsightRequest 流程
nodes.summary: 同意小凡看见申请的后端处理流程，包含状态更新、站内通知和订阅消息发送

nodes.label: SubscribeMessageGrant
nodes.summary: 记录用户对各订阅消息 scene 的授权库存的数据模型

nodes.label: SubscribeMessageDelivery
nodes.summary: 记录订阅消息发送、跳过和失败状态的投递日志数据模型

nodes.label: dispatchNotificationWithSubscribe
nodes.summary: 同时创建站内通知并触发订阅消息发送的工具函数

nodes.label: subscribe-auto-topup / maybeAutoTopUpSubscriptions
nodes.summary: 前端自动补充订阅授权的工具，在用户操作后请求对应 scene 的授权

nodes.label: pages/insight-detail/insight-detail
nodes.summary: 小凡看见详情页，订阅通知点击后的直达目标页面

nodes.summary: 他人小凡看见列表页，无具体 insightId 时的降级跳转目标

nodes.summary: 后端订阅消息配置文件，定义各 scene 的模板 ID 和字段映射

nodes.label: 洞见详情页（未遮罩）
nodes.summary: 管理后台洞见详情查看页面（未遮罩版本），展示用户提交的完整洞见内容及管理员编辑操作界面。

nodes.label: 报名管理页面

nodes.label: 洞见列表页
nodes.summary: 管理后台洞见列表页面，展示所有用户提交的洞见条目，支持按期次筛选、查看和管理洞见内容。

nodes.summary: 管理后台数据统计页面，展示晨读营运营核心指标，包括用户数、报名数、签到率等汇总数据图表。

nodes.label: 签到庆祝页面
